chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1355 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 10-09-2025 Mr. Muhammad Qayyum Arain, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G. **** Learned AAG files comments on behalf of D.C, Shikarpur under the cover of his statement, taken on record. He objected the very maintainability of this petition for want of jurisdiction as the matter pertains to Circuit Court, Larkana. When confronted, counsel for the petitioner does not press instant petition and submits that for redressal of his grievance, petitioner will approach the Circuit Court, Larkana. Order accordingly. The instant petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
